messages.content: IMU drift got much worse after the pool test. EKF position estimate diverges after 90 seconds.
We changed the MPU-9250 low-pass filter constants and reduced some of the high-frequency noise.
Finished tuning EKF covariance values. Localization is still shaky during turns but much better.
After the covariance tuning and filter changes, localization stayed stable for the full test run.
For mapping we switched from the old occupancy grid pipeline to a SLAM Toolbox configuration with loop closure enabled.
The mapping run improved after we cleaned the lidar timestamps and reduced duplicate scans in the bag replay.
Deployment note: we pinned the container image and fixed the environment file so the Jetson deploy stopped missing ROS dependencies.
Documentation task: summarize the sensor calibration checklist and put the final values into the shared experiment notes.
